name: Curried Rice with Chicken & Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the next five ingredients and stir-fry for 2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Gradually add chicken broth, stirring until smooth.
4. Stir in chicken cubes and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
5. Add rice and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes. Stir gently 2-3 times during the last few minutes of cooking to ensure even moisture distribution.
6. Remove from heat and stir in yogurt. Allow it to rest for a moment before serving.
Each serving provides:
1 Fat Gram (FA), 1/2 Fiber Grams (FR), 1-1/2 Protein Grams (P), 1 Bread Group (B)
317 Calories (C)
15 grams protein, 38 grams carbohydrates
12 grams fat: 6 grams polyunsaturated, 4 grams monounsaturated, 1 gram saturated
63 milligrams sodium (SOD), 21 milligrams cholesterol (CHOL)
Source information removed.
